objective: Optimize a product adoption analytics workload over a real DuckDB warehouse by materializing compact, reusable objects that speed up usage reporting without changing exact query outputs.

task_story: A product operations team reviews workspace adoption, in-app guidance engagement, and user journey activity to prioritize onboarding and feature rollout decisions.
